positive: A highly detailed, symmetrical, and mystical celestial constellation design. The central subject is a stylized, glowing crescent moon interwoven with sweeping astral nebulae and geometric star patterns. Incorporate elements of ancient mythology and deep-sea bioluminescence, achieving a blend of vintage engraving and modern neon glow. The composition must be centered and framed by clean, strong silhouettes. Use a restricted, high-contrast color palette of deep indigo, ethereal teal, gold metallic accents, and luminous cream white. The style should mimic a refined linocut print combined with vaporwave gradient aesthetics, ensuring crisp edges, minimal tonal gradients, and maximum readability as a garment graphic. Vector art, high contrast, symmetrical composition, elegant, magical.
negative: blurry, poor anatomy, deformed, text, watermark, signature, cropped, extra limbs, lowres, noisy, grain, artifacts, ugly, gradient fade, photorealism, logo, anime, graffiti
